lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Oh, hello. Any luck in the pyramid? I'd appreciate a cut of anything you find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... I'll be sure to let you know if I come across anything good...

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I'm fine, I'm fine. Just a scratch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're sure. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Me? I'm Tarik.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That hat you're wearing doesn't look like it comes from around here?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: It was a present. My employer thought it would suit me. I'm not sure it does, though it does keep the sun off very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is this employer?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Simon Templeton. He's an archaeologist. I worked as an assistant for him, though I haven't seen him since the plague business started, so I work for myself now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what have you been up to?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Simon suggested that there might be riches to be found in this pyramid.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: All I've found so far are injuries though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... What can you tell me about this pyramid?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Well, I'm not sure. It's called Jalsavrah apparently. It's a strange place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: First of all, there's something odd about the doors. There's four of them, but three of them lead to an empty tomb.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: The other one is guarded by something, and whatever it is, it doesn't like visitors.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: The thing is, the doors seem to change around sometimes. It's all quite confusing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this thing guarding one of them.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I think it might be a mummy. It's not very friendly, but it does allow you to enter some of the rooms in the tomb. They are dangerous though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm not afraid of a little danger.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Are you sure? The place is full of poisonous snakes and scarabs along with some rather nasty mummies as well. You could die in there.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I managed to get into one room, but the next room was harder. My lockpicking skills weren't good enough. Maybe I should have taken a lockpick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It all sounds like fun to me. So, is there anything valuable in there?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: There are lots of artefacts that you should be able to sell to a legitimate trader...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like your friend Simon Templeton?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Of course. He's as 'legitimate' as you can get.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything else of value in there?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I've heard a rumour that there is an ancient magic sceptre somewhere inside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, now you've piqued my interest. What do you know about this sceptre?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Not a lot. It's apparently made of gold and covered in jewels. It's supposed to have some magical powers as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Magical powers? This sounds good. What are they?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I'll let you know when I find it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not if I find it first!

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Hey! if you find it, I deserve a share of the profits! You wouldn't have known it existed without my help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll think about it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it's an odd place, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: You've been inside? Did you find anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing of particular note...

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Well if you do, I'd appreciate a share of any profits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... I'll think about it...

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Ohh... That looks nice. I'm looking forward to my cut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes... I'll bring it round later.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: I'll be waiting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, look at this sceptre I found!

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Wow! It looks very valuable. What's my share?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well given the work I had to go through to get it, I think I earned it all by myself.

lines.speaker: Tarik
lines.text: Hey, that's not fair. I told you about this pyramid!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The world is a harsh place. Live and learn.
